teacher_focus: the goal of isolating the variable in a linear equation
immediate_goal: identify that the solution requires isolating the variable on one side
misconceptions_to_probe: not knowing the goal of solving
allowed_reveal: the goal of isolating the variable
first_question: What is the main goal when solving a linear equation? (What do we want to end up with?)
checkpoint_rubric: states that the goal is to isolate the variable
mentions getting the variable alone on one side
escalation_rule: if the student does not correctly identify the goal, provide a breakthrough hint (hint_level=2) about reversing operations
